working_on: Cadence-trigger overdue-catchup logic fix + second project health check audit (catch-up covering S-0031 through S-0040). Pivoted from the planned Phase 5 epistemology build-readiness gate after boot caught the strict-modulo trigger silently slid past S-0040. Fix lands across register_state.json schema + session-start.sh hook + validate.py soft-warn + health_check.py field bump + ADR 0022 + ADR 0043 amendments + carriers. Catch-up audit absorbed scheduled S-0042 pushback/lesson adoption check; all audit-recommended actions plus user-surfaced fixes plus universal-scan rewrite of audit_dead_weight + audit_bloat + audit_gaps landed inline this session per user pushback on initial deferral attempts. Phase 5 epistemology gate slips one slot to S-0042.
outcome_summary: Cadence-trigger overdue-catchup fix (commit bed993c): replaced strict-modulo with `(next_id - last_audit_session) >= cadence`. New `last_audit_session` field in register_state.json (bootstrap S-0030); SessionStart hook computes slots_since with separate due/overdue surfaces + strict-modulo fallback for legacy schema; health_check.py bumps the field at report-emit; validate.py adds health_check_overdue soft-warn for defense-in-depth (default validator check count 16 → 17). ADR 0022 + ADR 0043 Decision/Consequences amended; carriers updated across health-check.md, session-build-lifecycle.md + skill, tools-validate-interpretation.md, .claude/commands/start-engine.md. 8 new tests (4 in test_validate.py, 4 in test_health_check.py); 188 tests pass. Catch-up audit (commit 5148a27): docs/health-checks/S-0041.md authored covering S-0031 → S-0040 with the silent-slide as headline finding; 5 mechanical + 13 manual observations. S-0042 scheduled audit consumed inline. S-0041 inline-fix batch (commit 47b2306): per user pushback on initial deferral, all audit-recommended plus 3 user-surfaced fixes plus universal-scan rewrite of audit_dead_weight + audit_bloat + audit_gaps landed in same session — convention amendment for pushback/lesson capture (shutdown-step explicit ask + skill mirror); HANDOFF.md cleanup pass (4 entries dispositioned with explicit Resolved: lines + cross-refs); recovery sanity check added to shutdown-sequence.md + skill mirror; sweep_worktrees.sh applied (37 stale worktrees removed) + counter-bug fix (subshell-zeroed counters); prep-paideia-prompt-pack.md disposition for all 14 prompts (12 closed, 2 carry phase-pinned decide-by triggers) + ROADMAP.md update; universal-scan rewrite of three audit categories (filesystem walk over all .md files with skip-prefix filter; new helpers _list_scanned_md_files + _last_touched_session + _count_inbound_citations; new constants BUILD_PLAN_DIR + DEAD_WEIGHT_SKIP_PATH_PREFIXES + DEAD_WEIGHT_SKIP_NAMES). Cold-review pass surfaced 4 issues (contract-block drift, tracked-vs-scanned wording, dead PRODUCT_DOCS_DIR constant) — all fixed inline in this close commit. First lesson-tagged MemPalace drawer captured (drawer_paideia_lessons_1d6c3631798c29f60c7153fa). First diary entry to wing=paideia per the diary-write convention. Net: 0 follow-up items carried forward to STATE.md After-S-0041. Validator clean at close (17 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns) after last_audit_session bumped to S-0041.
